quotes.quote: Cause it's so hard - To keep the dream alive - 'Cause if it all comes down to this - How will?
quotes.author: Hotellounge (Be the Death of Me)

quotes.quote: The ride isn't what I told you - The painkiller-side of this life - Is to not look behind it's over
quotes.author: The Ideal Crash

quotes.quote: I have been told about longing - A feeling so old, it's dead - I must have been misled
quotes.author: The Ideal Crash

quotes.quote: I once told a friend that nothing really ends - No one can prove it
quotes.author: Nothing Really Ends

quotes.quote: Ah, nevermind that outer space stuff - Let's get down to earth!
quotes.author: The Architect

quotes.quote: Oh, we guess a person's gotta do - What a person feels he must
quotes.author: The Architect

quotes.quote: Now the man has understood - That outerspace is overrated - About all the problems on this earth we should - Worry now to solve them later
quotes.author: The Architect

quotes.quote: And now I found something to look for, but I can't decide - 'Cause I might find that to stroll behind is better than to score - Just like I did before.
quotes.author: Instant Street

quotes.quote: This life's a soulless excuse for all abuse and parenthesis - The flyspecked windows and the stinking lobbies - They'll remain all the same, all the same.
quotes.author: Instant Street

quotes.quote: I'm caught in the flow of things - My memory's a broken machine
quotes.author: Serpentine

quotes.quote: I'm caught in the flow of sound - And you're just some melody
quotes.author: Serpentine

quotes.quote: This is how my day begins - This is just one day unseen
quotes.author: Serpentine

quotes.quote: Here comes the sun smiling - How long have you been blue?
quotes.author: 7 Days, 7 Weeks

quotes.quote: There'd ever be a time for us to recapture - All the time we lose
quotes.author: 7 Days, 7 Weeks

quotes.quote: This is definition of constant change - Transformation what we hope stays the same - Cold is the breeze but forever blows
quotes.author: Constant Now

quotes.quote: I was taught to be tolerant and plain - I was taught a million things I can't explain.
quotes.author: Sister Dew

quotes.quote: Please forgive me if I keep on smiling, but every sad story has a funny side in
quotes.author: Sister Dew

quotes.quote: Maybe I'm made for roaming - Or floating around in shackled dreams
quotes.author: Eternal Woman

quotes.quote: It's not about where you're going - But where you feel you already should have been
quotes.author: Eternal Woman

quotes.quote: Slow - Would be the tempo of the restless soul - You have seen what a listless life can bring
quotes.author: Slow

quotes.quote: Slow - Entireness of your control - Of the moment that is nearly standing still
quotes.author: Slow

quotes.quote: To wait for a minute and not a second more - Unphased like a forbidden thrill
quotes.author: Slow

quotes.quote: Gently behind the beat - We shuffle on ancient streets - The reverb of time - Is our vantage point
quotes.author: Slow

quotes.quote: We slept for a million years - Lived through a million fears - We are not nervous - We will not ask for more
quotes.author: Slow

quotes.quote: The more we understand - The slower our days
quotes.author: Slow

quotes.quote: Future is like burning time - The past abiding steam
quotes.author: Smokers Reflect

quotes.quote: Oh you're oversimplifying - So often you have pushed away - Until a lonely spring - Comes tell you certain things
quotes.author: Smokers Reflect

quotes.quote: Imagination if you dare - Can take you almost anywhere
quotes.author: Dark Sets In

quotes.quote: You been artificially sad - But never naturally high
quotes.author: Everybody's Weird

quotes.quote: Imagination will kill - If imagination stands still
quotes.author: Include Me Out

quotes.quote: Such anger that I couldn't vent - So much energy I couldn't spend
quotes.author: Let's See Who Goes Down First

quotes.quote: Wake me up before I sleep and I'll promise that I'll concentrate
quotes.author: Wake Me Up Before I Sleep

quotes.quote: There's nothing I can do that isn't gonna be a mistake
quotes.author: Wake Me Up Before I Sleep

quotes.quote: Oh they say that time presses, but time doesn't press - It's just a figure for motion and emotional unrest - It's a matter of seeing and of being seen
quotes.author: W.C.S. (First Draft)

quotes.quote: And the more I talk, the more I turn into a vegetable
quotes.author: Morticiachair

quotes.quote: These lines won't cut but all it takes is finding some - Way to weld
quotes.author: Jigsaw You

quotes.quote: But I have watched and I have seen - And I have counted all the passers-by - Me and my friend here we have been engaged - In a search for some time months now - For houses hotels and highlights, experienced midwives - For money to turn into medicine - And what do we find? - A shocking lack thereof.
quotes.author: A Shocking Lack Thereof

quotes.quote: My life's been mistaken for garbage and gold - My life is in private, I gotta move on 'till I'm old
quotes.author: A Shocking Lack Thereof

quotes.quote: I know it goes to show that the more you get, the more you got, The more you want some more
quotes.author: Supermarketsong

quotes.quote: I guess that's why - I hope I get old before I die - Admit it turned out okay for someone who didn't try.
quotes.author: Nine Threads

quotes.quote: Diving deep in oceans wide - Was the way for me, to hide away - A possibility, to leave today - I troubled everything too soon
quotes.author: Disappointed In The Sun

quotes.quote: Need I say my only wish was - To escape my earthly life - High skies were no option whereas
quotes.author: Disappointed In The Sun

quotes.quote: I wonder what thunder will mean, when only in my dream - The lightning comes before the roar - Circumstantial situations, now I know what people meant - Beware of the implications, God I've had enough of them
quotes.author: Disappointed In The Sun

quotes.quote: And all the magic you missed - And all the days you squandered - And all the nights you passed out - Countless are the nights you wandered
quotes.author: Stop-Start Nature

quotes.quote: We like the attention - But we hate to be judged - As we proudly parade - Where we see others trudge
quotes.author: Is a Robot

quotes.quote: We are slaves to addictions - That have no effect - And with loving precision - Isn't it love we dissect
quotes.author: Is a Robot

quotes.quote: But arrows or drifters - We all just pretend - That we will not succumb - To the ultimate trend
quotes.author: Is a Robot

quotes.quote: We don't really care - If the world is a mess - We are programmed to the grid - Of pleasure and bliss
quotes.author: Is a Robot

quotes.quote: Throwing out my popular culture - Cause now you know it's not great - If you don't come from the states - You will always be late to be in popular culture
quotes.author: Popular Culture

quotes.quote: It's like you're not really seen - Without a fashionable spleen - That is so much alike the one - Your heroes suffered
quotes.author: Popular Culture

quotes.quote: And so you gotta be strong - You've got to just speak in tongues - About how you belong - In popular culture
quotes.author: Popular Culture

quotes.quote: There's more that 20.000 ways - To end up in the same old place - Only one to get away - Only once you get a second chance
quotes.author: Twice We Survive

quotes.quote: Sunrise at the edge of my glass - Casting its hellish light over the inevitable - Future memories like truncated dailies - From the shoot of life
quotes.author: Ghosts

quotes.quote: Watch them skate over an acre of nostalgia - Slipping and sliding over the thinning ice of time - Scared of being the demon - Tired of being ignored
quotes.author: Ghosts

quotes.quote: Give your heart a little pause - You are more than your flaws - Get it out of their claws - Every breath that you draw
quotes.author: Easy

quotes.quote: Fame has put something in our drink - And this feeling's a raft that just wouldn't sink - Philosophy go kill Facebook scam - I think and un-think therefore I un-am
quotes.author: Girls Keep Drinking

quotes.quote: The lack of laughter's contagious - It spreads the panic within
quotes.author: The Give Up Gene
